scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: 100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer Gujarat
page_title: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: 100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer Gujarat

details: The scheme "Distribution of Seeds of more productive varieties / Hybrid varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies, etc,. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area (TASP)" with a component "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" is introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to assist Adivasi and Scheduled Tribe farmers in tribal and non-tribal areas to achieve higher agricultural production and improve their livelihoods. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided on items such as seeds of more productive/hybrid varieties, fertilizers, plant protection equipment, tarpaulins, micronutrients, water carrying pipelines, and pump sets.
benefits: 100% soluble chemical fertilizers/nano-fertilizers of FCO-approved grade subject to 75% of the purchase price or ₹ 750/- per hectare, will be eligible for subsidy. (subject to a maximum of four hectares per account)
As per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 19 and 22 of
eligibility: The applicant should belong to a Scheduled Tribe.
The applicant should be a farmer.
The applicant should be located in tribal areas OR be a tribal cultivator residing outside tribal areas.
The scheme excludes farmers from Dang district.

offline: Approach the Gram Sevak in your village for access to the "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" under the scheme.

faqs.question: What is the main aim of this scheme for farmers?
faqs.answer: The main aim is to help Adivasi farmers achieve higher agricultural crop production and improve their livelihood.

faqs.question: What kind of agricultural products and equipment are provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides seeds of more productive/hybrid varieties, fertilizer, plant protection equipment, tarpaulins, and other agricultural inputs.

faqs.question: Are there any other specific components covered besides seeds and fertilizers?
faqs.answer: Yes, the scheme also covers field demonstrations, micronutrients, agriculture fairs, water carrying pipelines, and pump sets.

faqs.question: What is the assistance for 100% soluble chemical fertilizer or nano-fertilizer?
faqs.answer: A subsidy is provided for 100% soluble chemical fertilizers/nano-fertilizers of FCO-approved grade.

faqs.question: Is there a maximum limit on the subsidy for 100% soluble chemical fertilizer?
faqs.answer: Yes, the subsidy is subject to a maximum of four hectares per account.

faqs.question: How often can I claim the benefit for 100% soluble chemical fertilizer/nano-fertilizer?
faqs.answer: The benefit for this component can be reclaimed every year.

faqs.question: Are there any specific conditions related to the assistance for 100% soluble chemical fertilizer/nano-fertilizer?
faqs.answer: Yes, the assistance is provided as per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 18, 19, and 22 of Appendix-1.

faqs.question: Are there any farmers who are not eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, scheduled tribe farmers from the Dang district are not eligible for the scheme.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum time limit to re-apply for benefits?
faqs.answer: For the 100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer component, the minimum time limit for reclaiming benefits is every year.
